title: What Will the Pain Points Be as Amazon Supply Chain Services Launches?
snippet: Expect Amazon to erode rivals’ market share. Amazon’s sophisticated global logistics network and disciplined processes get products to our door in record time. Innovative problem solving helped Amazon navigate supply chain disruption and exorbitant shipping fees during the pandemic.

title: Amazon Takes Its Logistics Network Public With Amazon Supply Chain Services — But Can It Replicate AWS-Style Disruption?
snippet: But logistics beyond the warehouse — cross-border shipping, customs, inventory allocation — has remained fragmented for most businesses. ASCS attempts to stitch those layers together, offering a single network that handles movement from factory floor to customer doorstep. The pitch lands at a time when companies are rethinking supply chains after years of disruption...

title: “미국 이란 휴전 여전히 유효하다”…이 한마디에 국제유가 4% 급락 - 매일경제
snippet: 5일(현지시간) 미국이 이란과의 교전 속에서도 휴전은 유효하다고 확인함에 따라 국제유가가 4% 가까이 내렸다. 이날 ICE 선물거래소에서 7월 인도분 브렌트유 선물 종가는 배럴당 109.87달러로 전장보다 3.99% 하락했다.
